rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
Use assign only for implementation-level output bindings with existing features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
Component type contracts must relate visible inputs to visible outputs without using implementation-only paths
AGREE expressions may only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax as defined in the AGREE annex
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
